name: @ce-net/tabnet
description: Run a large LLM sharded across many ordinary browser tabs (laptops and phones), coordinated so it is dead simple: open a URL, lend a tab. Pipeline-parallel inference over WebGPU, coordinated over the CE mesh (a coordinator tab serves a tabnet/<run> mesh service; peers discover it via the DHT) — no central server. Built on CE browser nodes via @ce-net/sdk.
author: Leif Rydenfalk <ledamecrydenfalk@gmail.com>
//: The browser parts (web/) are dependency-free vanilla JS + WebGPU + @ce-net/sdk (loaded via an import map / ?sdk= URL) and need NO build step. Coordination rides the CE mesh (web/mesh-coordinator.js + web/mesh-transport.js). The coordinator/ Cloudflare Worker + Durable Object is now DORMANT (kept for reference only) and is NOT required by the app — see coordinator/README.md.
